title: oqs-cbg-pipeline: Numerical implementation of the Colla–Breuer–Gasbarri minimal-dissipation effective-Hamiltonian framework
description:
Sail-internal repository implementing and benchmarking the currently validated surface of the Colla-Breuer-Gasbarri effective-Hamiltonian construction for non-Markovian open quantum systems under the Hayden-Sorce minimal-dissipation gauge. DG-1 has passed; DG-2 structural sub-claims have passed under the Council-cleared displacement-profile registry; the literal fourth-order K_2-K_4 recursive computation remains pending. Anchored to Council-cleared Breakwater Ledger entry CL-2026-005 v0.4.

Outputs are coordinate-dependent under the chosen gauge. See docs/do_not_cite_as.md for citation prohibitions.
notes: Current metadata version 0.3.0.dev0. DG-1 PASS (2026-04-30). DG-2 structural sub-claims PASS under the Council-cleared displacement-profile registry (2026-05-04). The literal fourth-order K_2-K_4 recursive computation, DG-3 cross-method validation, DG-4 failure-envelope work, and DG-5 thermodynamic discriminant remain pending. Live DG status: docs/validity_envelope.md.
